today_summary: GCM26 settled $4,038.7, down 1.4% ($57.3) from Monday's $4,096.0 close, leaving spot just $38.7 above the $4,000 put wall (4,326 OI) — well inside the $60.22 one-sigma daily band ($3,978–$4,099). ATM IV sits at 23.67%, and the 127,375-contract call OI base still outweighs 75,678 puts (P/C OI 0.59), but that call skew concentrates far above spot at $4,700 (4,591 OI) and the static $5,370 mega-wall (8,010 OI), leaving little near-term ceiling defense. Max pain at $4,800 sits 18.8% above spot — too distant at 29 DTE to exert meaningful pull today. Net GEX across the ±20% window is -$177.4, confirming dealers remain net short gamma from the $3,235 floor of that window all the way up through spot.
five_day_thesis: Over the last 5 sessions spot round-tripped from $4,149 (6/24) down to $4,009.8 (6/25), recovered to $4,096 (6/29), then faded back to $4,038.7 today — net -$110.3 (-2.7%) for the week with no clean trend, just chop around the $4,000 put wall. That put wall, and the $5,370 call wall, have not moved a single dollar in 5 straight sessions — the stickiest structural pairing of the current cycle — while max pain drifted down $25 from $4,825 to $4,800 in one step on 6/25, then held flat for four consecutive days. ATM IV expanded from 21.76% to 23.67% (+1.91pp), spiking to 26.43% mid-week (6/26) before partially retracing — vol got bought into the dip toward $4,000 and has not fully unwound. GEX stayed net negative all 5 sessions (-$241.3 to -$129.3, window total -$177.4 today), with no session flipping dealers long gamma — this chain has been structurally primed to amplify, not dampen, whichever way spot breaks, for the entire window. Call OI grew 8.2% (117.7k→127.4k) versus put OI's 5.0% growth (72.1k→75.7k) over the same 5 days, so new call-heavy positioning kept building even as spot chopped sideways-to-down — but it stacked at strikes well above spot ($4,700+) rather than reinforcing anything near-the-money.
what_changed: Spot down $57.3 (-1.4%) today to $4,038.7, now just $38.7 above the sticky $4,000 put wall — inside the $60.22 1-sigma band.
Put wall ($4,000, 4,326 OI) and call wall ($5,370, 8,010 OI) unchanged for a 5th consecutive session — no structural migration.
Max pain held at $4,800 for a 4th straight day after a one-time $25 drift down from $4,825 on 6/24-6/25.
ATM IV up 1.91pp over 5 days (21.76%→23.67%), after peaking at 26.43% mid-week on 6/26.
GEX stayed net negative every session (-$177.4 today, ranging -$129.3 to -$241.3 over the week) — dealers never flipped long gamma.
Call OI grew 8.2% vs put OI's 5.0% over 5 days, adding call-heavy skew concentrated at $4,700+ rather than near spot.
prediction: Bias is neutral-to-bearish below $4,075 given the persistent short-gamma regime — the single largest negative-GEX strike in the entire chain sits right at the $4,000 put wall (-43.7), so a clean breach likely accelerates losses toward $3,900 as dealer hedging amplifies rather than cushions the move. A close back above $4,075 with GEX stabilizing opens a retest of $4,150-$4,200 resistance, but $4,800 max pain is too far away (18.8%) at 29 DTE to be a realistic near-term magnet. Invalidation: sustained trade above $4,100 shifts the bias to neutral.

day_trade_cta.bias_note: Spot -1.4% into the sticky $4,000 put wall with GEX net negative all week — downside has less resistance than upside until $4,075 reclaims.
day_trade_cta.entry_note: Fade bounces into this zone on rejection from below $4,075; avoid chasing shorts once through $4,000 given cascade risk.
day_trade_cta.pivot_note: Sustained trade below → negative-gamma cascade opens $3,900, then the $3,500 put-wall zone. Sustained reclaim of $4,075 → path to $4,150-$4,200.
day_trade_cta.stop_note: +1.3% above entry midpoint, above today's pre-selloff close — invalidates the breakdown thesis.
day_trade_cta.target_note: T1 second-largest put wall (3,040 OI), take 50% off. T2 major put concentration (2,759 OI) if the cascade extends.
day_trade_cta.risk_note: Net GEX -$177.4 in the ±20% window, no flip to positive all week → expect amplified, not dampened, moves. Reduce size 30-50%.
